edwin       2007-09-07 06:38:26 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    archivers            Makefile 
  Added files:
    archivers/linux-par2cmdline Makefile distinfo.i386 pkg-descr 
  Log:
  [New port] archivers/linux-par2cmdline
  
          Linux version of par2cmdline. Useful when the native version
          does not work correctly (e.g. when you get a "Main packet
          not found" error).
  
  PR:             ports/112124
  Submitted by:   Ganael LAPLANCHE <ganael.laplanche@martymac.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.183     +1 -0      ports/archivers/Makefile
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/archivers/linux-par2cmdline/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/archivers/linux-par2cmdline/distinfo.i386 (new)
  1.1       +1 -0      ports/archivers/linux-par2cmdline/pkg-descr (new)
